jobDescription: We are looking for an experienced hands-on test Automation lead engineer with proven abilities to deliver fast and efficiently. A true team player who is eager to be part of a very unique opportunity in the startup scene. Qualifications & Experience At least 3 years of experience as Senior Automation Engineer for Enterprise products B. S.c. in Computer Science or other relevant fields Strong Javascript coding skills – must Experience with CI/ CD lifecycle integration (i.e. Jenkins) Experience with Docker, npm, shell scripting Familiar with SQL and/or No SQL DBs Knowledge of common testing frameworks Excellent English – spoken and written Financial affinity – significant advantage in the Fintech industry Load testing experience – an advantage Location Midtown Tower, Tel Aviv
